title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, with a dedicated AI component taught by Brian Yu. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with an active community across Discord, GitHub, and other channels.
writeup: This CS50 entry is a behind-the-scenes look at Chapter 1, "Playing," from Brian Yu's introduction to artificial intelligence, part of Harvard's introductory computer science course. The course covers the intellectual enterprises of computer science and programming, and is distributed through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with active community channels across social media and discussion platforms. The AI introduction is supplementary content within the broader curriculum.
